title: DLSA Sitapur Stenographer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline

short_info: District Legal Services Authority Sitapur (DLSA Sitapur) Stenographer Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Sitapur Stenographer Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
